categories.name: list_consent_information
categories.description: Retrieve a list of patients who have given consent, including formatted consent month/year, patient ID, patient code, center, country, and consent date.

categories.name: list_non_consent_information
categories.description: Retrieve a list of patients who have NOT given consent, including formatted consent month/year (as the expected consent date), patient ID, patient code, center, country, and consent date.

categories.name: count_non_consent_patients
categories.description: Count the total number of patients that have NOT given consent for the study.

categories.name: list_users_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of users associated with each center, including the center name, country, and user profile information.

categories.name: list_randomized_patients
categories.description: Retrieve a list of patients who have been randomized in the study, including patient ID, patient code, randomization date, treatment arm, center, and country.

categories.name: count_randomized_patients
categories.description: Count the total number of patients that have been randomized in the study.

categories.name: list_blocked_users
categories.description: Retrieve a list of users who have been blocked, including user ID, user name, profile, center, and country.

categories.name: list_patient_visits
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records for a specific patient, including visit date, visit type, site, and any associated notes.

categories.name: list_consent_signatures
categories.description: Retrieve a list of patients by center indicating consent status, the date it was signed, and the user who signed the consent.

categories.name: list_user_logins
categories.description: Retrieve a list of user login records, showing the username, login result (success/failure), and timestamp of the last login.

categories.name: list_amendments
categories.description: Retrieve all amendment records for a given patient, including amendment ID, date, description, and related fields.

categories.name: list_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve clarification records for a specific patient, including clarification ID, date, description, and any related notes.

categories.name: list_all_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve all clarification records across all patients, including clarification ID, patient ID, patient code, date, description, and notes.

categories.name: list_patients_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of all patients associated with a specific center, including patient ID, patient code, center name, and country.

categories.name: list_visits_by_fill_status
categories.description: Retrieve visits grouped by their fill status (to be filled, partially filled, fully filled), optionally filtered by study, center, or date range.

categories.name: list_visit_logs
categories.description: Retrieve all log entries related to a specific visit type for a given patient, using the logs and log_values tables.

categories.name: list_automatic_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve all automatically generated clarification records across the study, including clarification ID, patient ID, patient code, date, description, and any system‑generated notes.

categories.name: list_manual_closed_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve all manually created clarification records that were closed within a specified date range, across all patients.

categories.name: list_open_clarifications_by_patient
categories.description: Retrieve open clarification records for a specific patient, including clarification ID, date, description, and notes.

categories.name: list_pending_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve all clarification records that are still pending (status open) across all patients, including clarification ID, patient ID, patient code, date, description, and notes.

categories.name: list_closed_clarifications_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve all clarification records that have been resolved/closed, grouped by center.

categories.name: list_open_clarifications_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve all open (pending) clarification records, grouped by center.

categories.name: list_pending_manual_clarifications_by_site
categories.description: Retrieve pending (open) manual clarification records for patients belonging to a specific site (center), including clarification ID, patient ID, patient code, clarification date, description, and notes.

categories.name: list_all_patients
categories.description: Retrieve a list of all patients in the study, including basic identifying information.

categories.name: list_all_closed_clarifications
categories.description: Retrieve all clarification records that have been closed, across all patients and centers.

categories.name: count_patients_by_enrollment_timestamp
categories.description: Count the number of patients enrolled, grouped by the timestamp of their insertion into the eCRF.

categories.name: list_all_sites
categories.description: Retrieve a list of all sites (centers) in the study, including site identifier, name, and country.

categories.name: list_closed_visits
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records that have a status of closed, including their IDs and any relevant details.

categories.name: list_open_visits
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records that have a status of open, including their IDs and relevant details such as patient ID, visit type, date, site, center and label.

categories.name: list_edited_visits
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records that have been edited/modified after their initial creation, including identifiers and details of the edit.

categories.name: list_subject_completion_percentage
categories.description: Calculate, for each subject (patient), the completion percentage defined as the number of closed visits divided by the total number of visits.

categories.name: list_subjects_with_randomization
categories.description: Retrieve a list of all subjects (patients) including their randomization information such as randomization date and treatment arm.

categories.name: list_non_randomized_subjects
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) that have NOT been randomized, including patient ID, patient code, center name, and country.

categories.name: list_randomized_and_signed_subjects
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have both been randomized and have a signed consent.

categories.name: list_randomized_and_signed_subjects_by_site
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) belonging to a specific site, who have both randomization information and a signed consent.

categories.name: list_randomized_and_signed_subjects_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) belonging to a specific center, who have both randomization information and a signed consent.

categories.name: count_subjects_by_site
categories.description: Count the number of subjects (patients) grouped by site.

categories.name: count_subjects_by_center
categories.description: Count the number of subjects (patients) grouped by center.

categories.name: list_sites_by_country
categories.description: Retrieve a list of sites (centers) filtered by a specific country.

categories.name: list_subjects_by_site
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) belonging to a specific site, optionally filtered by country.

categories.name: list_subjects_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) belonging to a specific center, optionally filtered by country.

categories.name: list_patients_by_country_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of patients belonging to centers located in a specific country.

categories.name: list_signed_subjects_by_site_and_country
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have signed consent and belong to a specific site, filtered by country.

categories.name: list_signed_subjects_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have signed consent and belong to a specific center, optionally filtered by country.

categories.name: list_non_signed_subjects_by_site_and_country
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have NOT signed consent and belong to a specific site, optionally filtered by country.

categories.name: list_non_signed_subjects_by_center
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have NOT signed consent and belong to a specific center, optionally filtered by country.

categories.name: list_signed_subjects_by_country
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have signed consent and belong to sites located in a specific country.

categories.name: list_non_signed_subjects_by_country
categories.description: Retrieve a list of subjects (patients) who have NOT signed consent and belong to sites located in a specific country.

categories.name: list_all_signed_subjects
categories.description: Retrieve a list of all subjects (patients) who have signed informed consent, ordered by the date the consent was signed.

categories.name: list_closed_visits_with_site_and_label
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records that have a status of closed, including site and visit label information.

categories.name: list_closed_visits_with_center_and_label
categories.description: Retrieve all visit records that have a status of false, including center and visit label information.
